ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "auth_provider" TEXT /* Authentication provider (e.g., LDAP, Active Directory) */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier from the authentication provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the repository */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the repository (e.g., public, private) */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission set */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "perm_pull" INTEGER /* Permission to pull from the repository */,
  "perm_push" INTEGER /* Permission to push to the repository */,
  "perm_admin" INTEGER /* Permission to administer the repository */,
  "perm_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of last synchronization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission set */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Synchronization status (e.g., pending, synced, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, maintainer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repo_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "released_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repo_versions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the branch was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the branch */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the branch is the default branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "committer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the commit */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the commit was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_committer_id FOREIGN KEY ("committer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pull_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "pull_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the pull request */,
  "pull_message" TEXT /* Message of the pull request */,
  "pull_date" TEXT /* Date of the pull request */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pull request */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the pull request was made */,
  "target_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target branch for the pull request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pull request (e.g., open, merged, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_target_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date of the issue */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, repository creation, permission update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
